source_name: ISO 14040:2006 Environmental management - Life cycle assessment - Principles and framework
relevance: Defines LCA principles, framework, goal and scope, LCI, LCIA, interpretation, reporting, and critical review.
model_decision_supported: Use ISO phases as the backbone of the LCA module.
notes: Current version confirmed by ISO in 2022.

source_name: ISO 14044:2006 Environmental management - Life cycle assessment - Requirements and guidelines
relevance: Defines LCA requirements and practitioner guidance.
column16: Current version confirmed by ISO in 2022.

source_name: International Reference Life Cycle Data System ILCD Handbook - General guide for Life Cycle Assessment - Detailed guidance
relevance: Provides practical technical guidance for consistent and quality-assured LCA studies.
model_decision_supported: Use as data quality and documentation reference.
notes: Useful bridge between ISO principles and practical modelling.

source_name: IOGP Report 672 - Overview of lifecycle assessment for carbon capture and storage projects
relevance: CCS project lifecycle guidance including transport and storage projects and hub-type networks.
model_decision_supported: Use for CCS system boundaries and reporting stages.
notes: Also available locally as supplied PDF.

source_name: NORSUS OR 28.22 - Guidelines for Life Cycle Assessment of CCU systems
relevance: Guidance on CO2 source, reference systems, system expansion, and transparent CCU/CCS comparison.
model_decision_supported: Use to avoid unfair reuse/new-build comparison and double counting CO2 benefit.

source_name: Global CO2 Initiative TEA and LCA Guidelines for CO2 Utilization
relevance: Harmonised guidance for rigorous and transparent TEA/LCA of CO2 utilisation.
model_decision_supported: Use as a transparency and reporting reference for CO2 systems.
notes: More CCU-focused than pipeline reuse, but useful for consistency.

relevance: Background process database for steel, electricity, diesel, freight, construction, and waste treatment.
model_decision_supported: Use local licensed database for calculations; commit only mapping metadata.
notes: Do not commit licensed unit-process data.

source_name: Supplementary LCA workbook with capture auxiliary and storage inventories
relevance: Example inventory structure for capture, auxiliary processes, and permanent storage.
notes: Do not copy values blindly into the pipeline reuse case.

model_decision_supported: Candidate engine for reproducible local calculation.
notes: Good fit with a Python pipeline model.

relevance: Free professional LCA and footprint software with many databases.
notes: Useful for independent verification of Brightway results.

source_name: Life cycle assessment of emerging technologies - review literature
relevance: Discusses uncertainty and scale-up issues for early-stage technologies.
model_decision_supported: Use later if prospective CCS infrastructure scenarios are added.
notes: Not used in version 1 conventional LCA.

source_name: Futura scenario analysis for prospective LCA
relevance: Transparent scenario analysis for prospective LCA.
model_decision_supported: Use later for 2030 or 2050 background scenarios.
notes: Not used in version 1 conventional LCA.

source_name: Dynamic LCA and time-dependent climate impact literature
relevance: Tracks timing of emissions and time-dependent climate effects.
model_decision_supported: Use later if storage timing or delayed emissions become important.
notes: Not used in version 1 conventional LCA.
